titleStmt.title: SII 34.5: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 5. Tirumaṇañjēri, Mayiladuturai Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the north, west and south wall of the central shrine in the Udvāhanāthasvāmin temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, 8th year = A.D. 1078.

The king's eulogy is given in lines 1-44. States that at the request of Muṉaiyadaraiyar, the king ordered for the proper arrangement of the different services in the temple using the income of some tirunāmattukkāṇi land at Uttaṅguḍi alias Kōṭṭaiyūr in Kuṟukkai-nāḍu in Virudarājabhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu. It is said that until the current year there was no inscription and proper record of the services that depended on the income. On representation (viṇṇappam) regarding this by Muṉaiyadaraiyar the king issued the relevant order to set it right. The tirumandira-ōlai, Vikkiramasiṅga-Viḻupparaiyar wrote the royal order and the purvuvari-tiṇaikkaḷa-nāyagam Nittavinōda-Mūvēndavēḷāṉ got it inscribed on stone.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ
cūḻnta puviyil ponnē
mi Aḷavun tannēmi naṭappa viḷaṅ
ku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkōpparuvat
tuc cakkara kōṭṭattu vikkiramat
toḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu ma
tuvaraiyīṭṭam vayirākarattu vāriyil
muṉaikkontaḷavaracar tantaḷamiriya vāḷuṟai ka
ḻittut tōḷvalikāṭṭip pōṟpari naṭātti
kīrttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭi
ttenṟicait tēmaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumai
yum ponniyāṭai nannilappāvai tanimai
yun=tavirttu punitaru tirumaṇimakuṭa
m Urimaiyiṟ cū
ṭi tannaṭi Iraṇ
ṭun taṭamuṭiyākat
ton nila vēn=tar cūṭa muṉaima
nuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟappac
ceṅkōl ticaitoṟuñ cella
veṇkuṭai Irunila vaḷākam Eṅ
kaṇun=taṉātu tiruniḻal veṇṇi varat
tikaḻa Orutanimēruviṟpuli viḷaiyāṭa
pārkaṭaṟṟīvāntarattu pūpar tiṟaivi
ṭutanta kalañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai ni
vilaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paruntalai
ttiṭat tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik ki
ṭappa vinnāḷ piṟakkulappiṟai pōla
niṟpa piḻaiyēnenuñ colletir[kō
ṭiṟ]ṟallatu tankai villeti
rkōṭā vikkalan kallatar naṅkili
tuṭaṅki maṇalūr naṭuvena tuṅ[ kapat
ti] raiyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅ
ḷiṟum viṭṭataṉmānamuṅ kūṟiya vī
ramuṅ kiṭappa veṟiy malaikaḷumutu
kuneḷippa viḻinta natikaḷum cūḻ
ntuṭaintōṭa viḻunta kaṭaluntalai
virittalamara kuṭaticait tannāṭu
kantu tānun tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala payattetir māṟiya jaya
peruntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻun yum vāḷāvi
ṭṭa maṭanntaiyarīṭṭamum mīḷātu kuṭuttaveniraiyum kaṅ
kamaṇṭalamum ciṅkaṇavennum pāṇiyiraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇṭāramunti
ruppuyattalaṅkalum pōla vīramuntiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai mēvalar vaṇa
ṅka vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōvirājakēcari panmarānacakkaravarttikaḷ śrīkulōttuṅka cōḻa
tēvaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu viruta rājapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkai nāṭṭuk kaṅkai
koṇṭa cōḻac caruppētimaṅkalattu tiru tēvar tirunāmattu kāṇi Innāṭṭu Uttan kuṭiyāna kōṭṭaiyūr ni ṟa On kkāṇi muntiri muppattu nāṟkalane mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻiyināl pata niccayitta nellaṟu nūṟṟeṇpatin kalam Itu yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu varaiyuṅ kalveṭṭum sātana Inṟi nivantam ceytu vantamaiyil kōṭṭūruṭaiya kulamāṇikka viṇṇappattāl tiruvāy moḻintaruḷitti tañ ceytaruḷi vantamaiyil Ivvūr niccayitta nel laṟunūṟṟeṇpatin kalattukkum Ūrkālālaṭṭa nellāyirattu munnūṟṟaṟupatin kalam Innellāyirattu munnūṟṟarupatiṉ kalattukku nallāvūranntaiyār veṇkāṭanārāna rājēntra c cōḻak kaṇkāṇiyālum sapaiyārum tiruvetirkoḷpāṭip piccarum tiru
ruvamutarici kuṟuṇiyāka santi 3kkuttiruvamutu m tiruvattacāmattukku Arici nānāḻiyum Āka Arici mu llirutūṇi Aṟuk kkum Agni kāriyattukkum te nel kuṟuṇiyum tayiramutirunāḻikku nellaṟu nāḻiyum Uppa mutu miḷakamutukku liru nāḻiyum Aṭaikkāy 10 9 kum Ilaiyamutukkum nel nānāḻiyum tirununtāviḷakku 2 santiviḷakku 10 9 kku Eṇṇai Urikku nel patakkum nta viḷakkukku Eṇṇai Uḻakkukku nel kuṟuṇiyum Āka nāḷ 1 kku nel kalane tūṇi Aṟunāḻiyāka nāḷ 3 100 6 10 kku nellañnūṟṟirukalane tūṇippatakkum cantana citārikku nel patinṅkalamum tirupparicaṭṭam 4 m tirumēṟkaṭṭi 1 m tirunamanikai 1 m Uttiriyam 2 m 2m jalapavitram 1 m tiruvitāna patin tirupputiyatamutukku nellu kuṟuṇi kku nel
mum kōyil putukkuppuṟam nel muppatin kalamum Āka nel nūṟṟeḻupatanṅkalam Āka tiruppaṭimāṟṟukkum tiruppa nūṟṟeḻupattēḻu kalam ye Iraṇṭu māvum Itunukku vaṭakkum piṭāri kōyilukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭakkum nilamaraiye Oru māvum naṟuvili viḷākam nilamaraiyē māvum kīḻkaṇṭattut teṟkaṭaiya nilam kālum patinānmāvin kīḻai nilamaraiyum Aḻi laimela m naṟuviliviḷākattil kiḻakku lumāvum nāṭa nilam �lum kīḻkaṇṭattil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilamaraikkit teṟku nilamaraiyum kammukaṭiyil mēṟkaṭaiya nilamūnṟumāvum kīḻkaṇṭattu vaṭakkaṭaiyak kāl nīkki Itukkut teṟku nilam Orumāvum nilam Añcaraiyē Araimāvum tiruvāṉai nāḷ 1 kku nel kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyāka nel nāṟpattēḻukkalattukku nilam O tan ki ṟkup pērāl nel takkukku mukkālil vaṭakkaṭaiya kaṇṭattil vaṭamē
ṟkaṭaiya nilanānmāvumāka nilam Onpati māvum kāvēri ninṟu tirumañcaṉam cumappāṉukku nāḷ 1- kku nel kuṟuṇi nānāḻiyāka ne tukkut teṟku nilam p paṟippānukku ne yum toṭuppān 1- vanukku nellaṟu nāḻiyumāka 2 ṟku nāḷ 1- kku nel kuṟuṇi Irunāḻiyāka nel muppatteḻukalanetūṇippatakkukku ti naṟuvili viḷākatti mēlaippattil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam kālum tiruppatiyam viṇṇappañ ceyvār 2- vaṟku nānāḻiyāka nāḷ 1- kku nel mukkuṟuṇiyum nilattu Aḻiyānilai kīḻainilam Eṭṭumā Oṭṭaippattil vaṭamēṟkaṭaiya nilam Araikkālumā nilam Araiye Araimāvum tiruvalaku meḻukkiṭuvān 1- vanukku nāḷ 1- kku nel nānāḻiyāka nel patinṅkalattu nilam Oṭṭaippattin vaṭakiḻakkaṭaiya nilam tirumeykāppān kavanukku nel kuṟuṇiyirunāḻiyāka nel muppattēḻukalanē tūṇippatakkukku nilam nilamaṟumā nīkki Itukku vaṭakkum ttil naṭuvil m mūnṟumāvumāka nilam kālēyarai kku kaḷḷa
ne tūṇippatakkukku nilam kuḷaṅkaraippattil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam nānmākkāṇiyumāka raikkum mēlaippattil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam lum kīḻkaṇṭattil naṭuviṟpattil teṟkaṭai nilameḻumāvumāka nilamukkālemākāṇiyum nākapāṇi tillai nāyakak tiruveturkoḷpāṭippiccanukku nāḷ 1- kku nel mukkuṟuṇiyāl nel toṇṇūṟṟukkalattukku nilam kuḷaṅkarai mēlaippattil teṟkaṭaiya nilam kālē mukkāṇiyum naṟuvili viḷākattil mēlaippattil teṟkaṭaiya nilam kālum Itukku mēṟku kaḻukaṭimēṭu nilam Iraṇṭu māvumāka nilamaraiyē Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇiyum tēvakanmi 1 vanukku nāḷ 1 kku nel kuṟuṇiyāka nel muppatinkalattukku nilam mēlai mukkālil vaṭakkaṭaiyakkāl nīkki Itukkut teṟku nilamaraikkālum kōnāṭan Eṭṭumāvil vaṭakkaṭaiya nilamūnṟumāvumāka nilam kālēyaraimāvum Uvaccāḷ Oruvaṟku nāḷ 1 kku nel tūṇiyāka nel nūṟṟiruvatin kalattukku nilamēlai mukkālil mē ṟkaṭaiya nilamaṟumāvum Itan pattin teṟkaṭaiya nilaṅ ṭattil canimūlai nilaṅkālumāka nilamukkālē Orumāvu
lane tūṇippatakkukku nilam nālaraiyē nālumā Ākat tiruccennaṭaikkum tiruppaṇi nivantaṅkaḷukkum nellāyirattu munnūṟṟarupatin kalattukku m pat nānmāvarai Itil tiruviḻāvukku nel toṇṇūṟṟuk kalamum putukkuṭi ppuṟattukku nel muppatin kalamumāka nel nūṟṟirupatinkalattukku nilam Ūrin tenkaṇṭattu naṟuviliviḷākattin kīḻainilam yenān vum kīḻkaṇṭattut teṟkaṭaiya vēli Iraṇṭumā nīkki Itan vaṭakkaṭaiya nilan mūṉṟumāvumāka nilamukkāleyiraṇṭu mā Ivūr nattattālum kuḷaṅkaḷālum vāykkālkaḷālum nilam Onṟē nālumā mukkāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikai Āka nilam patinonṟē Onpatumākkāṇi yaraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Ittēvarkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu ḷḷiṭṭinavayiṟṟukkum palapaṇi niva nimantam ceyka Enṟu muṉaiyattaraiyar viṇṇappattāl tirumantraōlai vikkiramaciṅka viḻupparaiyareḻuttināl tirumukam piracātam ceytaruḷi vantamaiyil Itu cantrādittavaṟ cellak kallil veṭṭuvittān puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam Uyyak koṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭup pērāvūr nāṭṭuk kū paṭṭālakan sarvadevatāna nittavinōta mūvēnta vēḷā n Itu pan[ māheśvara rakṣai]
Digital edition of SII 34.5 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
